message.content:
@startuml
title Interactions between the Control Plane (master node) and the Worker Node

actor Georgina as G

participant "API-Server" as API #lightblue
participant "etcd" as etcd #lightblue
participant "Controller Manager" as CM #lightblue
participant "Scheduler" as SCH #lightblue
participant "Power Operator" as PO #lightblue
participant "Kubelet" as KUB #lightgreen
participant "Power Node Agent" as PNA #lightgreen
participant "Power Optimization Library" as POL #lightgreen
participant "K8s Objects" as K8S #lightgreen
participant "Kube-Proxy" as KP #lightgreen

== Kubernetes Initialization ==

G -> API : 1 kubectl create -f pod.yaml
API -> etcd : 2 save new state
etcd -> CM : 3 check for changes
CM -> SCH : 4 watch for unassigned pods(s)
SCH -> API : 5 notify about pod w nodename=""
API -> SCH : 6 assign pod to node
SCH -> etcd : 7 save new state
etcd -> KUB : 8 look for newly assigned pod(s)
KUB -> API : 9 bind pod to node
KUB -> KUB : 10 start container
KUB -> API : 11 update pod status
API -> etcd : 12 save new state

== Power Manager Initialization ==

G -> KP : 1 Ensure correct proxy configuration
G -> KUB : 2 Confirm CPU Manager policy
KUB --> G : cpuManagerPolicy = "static"
G -> KUB : 3 Reserve System CPUs
KUB --> G : reservedSystemCPUs = "0"
G -> PO : 4 Create Namespace
PO -> K8S : apply config/rbac/namespace.yaml
G -> PO : 5 Create RBAC and Service Accounts
PO -> K8S : apply config/rbac/rbac.yaml
G -> POL : 6 Create CRDs
POL -> K8S : make
G -> PNA : 7 Label nodes
PNA -> K8S : label node <NODE_NAME> feature.node.kubernetes.io/power-node="true"

== Power Manager Deployment ==

G -> PO : 1 Deploy Controller Manager
PO -> K8S : apply config/manager/manager.yaml
G -> PO : 2 Deploy the config
PO -> K8S : examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
G -> PO : 3 Set Shared Profile
PO -> K8S : examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
G -> PO : 4 Deploy th Workload
PO -> K8S : examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
G -> PO : 5 Deploy Pod
PO -> K8S : examples/example-pod.yaml

== Power Manager additional functionality ==

group Uncore
G -> KUB : 1 Confirm Kernel verson
KUB --> G : kernel 5.6+ required for uncore
G -> PO : 2 Set Freq in Die and Pkg
PO -> K8S : examples/example-uncore
G -> PO : 3 Deploy Controller Manager
PO -> K8S : apply config/manager/manager.yaml
G -> PO : 4 Deploy the config
PO -> K8S : examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
G -> PO : 5 Set Shared Profile
PO -> K8S : examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
G -> PO : 6 Deploy th Workload
PO -> K8S : examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
G -> PO : 7 Deploy Pod
PO -> K8S : examples/example-pod.yaml
G -> PO : 8 Set Time of Day functionality
PO -> K8S : examples/example-timeofday
end

group P-State
G -> PO : 1 Deploy Controller Manager
PO -> K8S : apply config/manager/manager.yaml
G -> PO : 2 Deploy the config
PO -> K8S : examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
G -> PO : 3 Set Shared Profile\nand configure the P-State governor
PO -> K8S : examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
G -> PO : 4 Deploy th Workload
PO -> K8S : examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
G -> PO : 5 Deploy Pod
PO -> K8S : examples/example-pod.yaml
end

group C-State
G -> PO : Deploy Controller Manager
PO -> K8S : apply config/manager/manager.yaml
G -> PO : Deploy the config
PO -> K8S : examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
G -> PO : Set Shared Profile
PO -> K8S : examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
G -> PO : Deploy th Workload
PO -> K8S : examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
G -> PO : Deploy Pod
PO -> K8S : examples/example-pod.yaml
G -> PO : Set C-State functionality
PO -> K8S : examples/example-cstates
end

group Time of Day
G -> PO : Deploy Controller Manager
PO -> K8S : apply config/manager/manager.yaml
G -> PO : Deploy the config
PO -> K8S : examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
G -> PO : Set Shared Profile
PO -> K8S : examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
G -> PO : Deploy th Workload
PO -> K8S : examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
G -> PO : Deploy Pod
PO -> K8S : examples/example-pod.yaml
G -> PO : Set Time of Day functionality
PO -> K8S : examples/example-timeofday
end

@enduml
